name: Karen's Fresh Tomato Salsa
recipeIngredient: 4 large ripe tomatoes, seeded & finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a non-metallic bowl.
2. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
Optional preparation:
1. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Simmer for 30 minutes, allowing the mixture to cool.
3. Place the cooled mixture in a non-metallic bowl and refrigerate until ready to serve.
